title: Creamy Algerian Chickpea Soup
description: A comforting and flavorful soup originating from Algeria, made with chickpeas, tangy and creamy ingredients.

ingredients.name: tangy tomato paste
ingredients.notes: or substitute with regular tomato paste

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for another minute.
Stir in the Algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chickpeas, coconut milk, and vegetable broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
